untranslatable_reason: Signal requires cascade pyramiding logic across three distinct MA crossovers (8-period, 21-period, 55-period) with conditional price-holding confirmation. The allowed indicator set lacks 8-period MA (only sma_5, sma_10, sma_20, etc.) and the rule engine does not support multi-stage position-adding logic with consecutive-bar conditions (3 bars above MAs). The 'progressively less sensitive cascade' and 'three-tranche pyramiding' mechanics cannot be expressed in a single 3-field condition format.
translation_notes: Approximated initial trigger using ema_5 crosses sma_20 as closest analog to 8-MA/21-MA cross. Medium/slow MA cascade and add-on conditions require stateful position management not supported by this schema. Trailing stop converted to fixed 1.5% stop_loss_pct. Signal is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT but mapped to LONG for directional clarity; true implementation would need regime detection and reversal logic.
